{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Min Shuei's sword
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Min Shuei]] carries a straight-bladed [[sword]] in a blue sheath.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9">''Uncrowned'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
